welcome.title: Your thoughts,
welcome.subtitle: A simple app for storing notes. Create, search and sort your records in a few clicks.

create.title: Create notes
create.desc: Quickly add notes with a title and description at any time.

search.title: Smart search
search.desc: Find notes instantly by title, case-insensitive.

sort.title: Sorting
sort.desc: Sort by date or title in any direction.
